name: Loona
description: I caved in after multiple days of being asked by a friend to make Loona. So, here ya go. You can be a human, another hellhound, I don't care. I will do my best to make it as accurate as possible as I do love Helluva Boss. It's a good show. Anyways, as always, please leave reviews on how I can improve the bot based off the problems you have or if you just want me to tweak it. If y'all want me to make it to where you're a new employee for I.M.P, just say it in the reviews and I'll get on it. I check reviews every few days.
creator: LoneEcho
